context.description: Metadata regarding the current stock context and timestamp.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the analysis was generated (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).

previous_close.description: The stock's previous closing price as a float.

analysis.description: Detailed news evaluation and cross-referenced sentiment data.

sentiment_score.description: Sentiment score normalized between -1.0 (extremely negative) and 1.0 (extremely positive).

critical_news_summary.description: A bulleted array of 1-sentence critical news summary points.

news_reports.description: Individual relevant news articles compiled from verified sources.

title.description: The exact article headline or news release title.

source.description: The media or regulatory source name.

published_at.description: The earliest identified publication timestamp to evaluate immediate market impact.

url.description: The direct URL to the article source if available.

impact_analysis.description: Contextual impact statement highlighting specific effects on the asset.

summary_points.description: Exactly three key takeaways representing the quantitative, structural, and predictive aspects of the report.

ceo_impact_assessment.description: Operational and macroeconomic assessments impacting corporate leadership directives.

operational_impact.description: 1-2 sentences summarizing how the news directly affects operations, revenue, or guidance.

macro_headwind_factor.description: 1-2 sentences addressing broader sector trends or macroeconomic/geopolitical impacts.

price_prediction.description: Quantitative forecast metrics derived from short-term catalysts.

today_trend.description: Predicted intraday direction of the price trend.

expected_open.description: The projected opening price for the upcoming or active session.

change_percentage.description: Expected net percentage change for the day.

low.description: Price prediction for the low end of the expected intraday trading range.

low_percentage.description: Percentage variance from the previous close to the projected intraday low.

high.description: Price prediction for the high end of the expected intraday trading range.

high_percentage.description: Percentage variance from the previous close to the projected intraday high.

success_probability.description: Statistical probability that the actual trading range remains within boundaries (e.g., '90%').

confidence_level.description: Qualitative confidence level assigned based on data volume and source verification (e.g., '80%').

actionable_next_steps.description: Direct, actionable tactical execution paths or warnings tailored for the trader.

notes.description: Critical edge-case info or high-risk rumor flags. Leave as an empty string if none exist.
